title: Drederick findings
description: Scope-enforced recon findings emitted by the drederick harness. See docs/DATASETTE.md for the schema reference.

findings.description: SQLite database written by Drederick.Reporting.SqliteReport at the end of every run (out/findings.db). One row per discovered host, service, finding, CVE, PoC reference, fetched PoC artifact, and detected operator tool.

hosts.title: Hosts
hosts.description: One row per in-scope target that produced at least one finding. Keyed by address (IPv4/IPv6 string); hostname is populated from the DNS probe when available.

services.title: Services
services.description: TCP/UDP services discovered by the nmap probe, one row per (host, port, proto). product/version come from nmap -sV.

findings.title: Findings
findings.description: Raw probe output keyed to a host (and optionally a service). 'kind' is the probe type (nmap, nmap-script, http, tls, dns, cve, ...). 'data_json' is the structured payload for that finding.

cves.title: CVEs
cves.description: CVE records annotated onto services by the enrichment layer. 'cvss' is the numeric base score (0.0-10.0); 'published' is an ISO-8601 timestamp. Facet buckets are shown raw — for score bands or year buckets, use the canned queries.

poc_refs.title: PoC references
poc_refs.description: Pointers to public proof-of-concept material for a given CVE (ExploitDB ID, GitHub repo, Metasploit module name, etc). References only — Drederick never executes PoCs.

poc_sources.title: PoC sources (fetched artifacts)
poc_sources.description: Local cache of fetched PoC content keyed by (source, external_id) with sha256 for integrity. Used to de-duplicate downloads across runs.

tooling.title: Operator tooling
tooling.description: Result of `drederick doctor` — detected operator-workstation tools (nmap, searchsploit, datasette, ...), their versions, and where they were found on PATH.

cves_by_host.title: CVEs by host
cves_by_host.description: Every (host, service) that has at least one CVE finding, joined to the cves table. Ordered by CVSS descending.
cves_by_host.sql: SELECT h.address, s.port, s.service, s.product, s.version, c.cve_id, c.cvss, c.summary FROM hosts h JOIN services s ON s.host_id = h.id JOIN findings f ON f.service_id = s.id JOIN cves c ON c.cve_id = json_extract(f.data_json, '$.cve_id') WHERE f.kind = 'cve' ORDER BY c.cvss DESC

services_with_pocs.title: Services with public PoCs
services_with_pocs.description: Services whose annotated CVE has at least one entry in poc_refs. Ordered by CVSS descending, then host/port for stability.
services_with_pocs.sql: SELECT h.address, s.port, s.service, s.product, s.version, c.cve_id, c.cvss, p.source AS poc_source, p.external_id, p.url FROM hosts h JOIN services s ON s.host_id = h.id JOIN findings f ON f.service_id = s.id JOIN cves c ON c.cve_id = json_extract(f.data_json, '$.cve_id') JOIN poc_refs p ON p.cve_id = c.cve_id WHERE f.kind = 'cve' ORDER BY c.cvss DESC, h.address, s.port

pocs_by_source.title: PoC references grouped by source
pocs_by_source.description: Count of PoC references per upstream source (exploit-db, github, metasploit, ...).
pocs_by_source.sql: SELECT source, COUNT(*) AS ref_count FROM poc_refs GROUP BY source ORDER BY ref_count DESC

tooling_detected.title: Operator tooling detected
tooling_detected.description: All tools detected by `drederick doctor` in alphabetical order.
tooling_detected.sql: SELECT * FROM tooling ORDER BY name

top_cves_by_cvss.title: Top 50 CVEs by CVSS
top_cves_by_cvss.description: Top 50 CVEs annotated onto this run, highest CVSS first. NULL CVSS values sort last.
top_cves_by_cvss.sql: SELECT cve_id, cvss, summary FROM cves ORDER BY cvss DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50
